node_20.subject: Li Mingzhu
node_20.description: Li Mingzhu is going about their routine
node_20.embedding_key: Li Mingzhu is going about their routine

node_19.subject: Li Mingzhu
node_19.description: This is Li Mingzhu's plan for Sunday February 15: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am.
node_19.embedding_key: This is Li Mingzhu's plan for Sunday February 15: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am.

node_12.subject: self
node_12.description: She takes pride in making tired travelers feel that her tea house is a dependable refuge.
node_12.embedding_key: She takes pride in making tired travelers feel that her tea house is a dependable refuge.

node_11.subject: self
node_11.description: She worries that cakes may run short if the festival turnout is strong.
node_11.embedding_key: She worries that cakes may run short if the festival turnout is strong.

node_10.subject: self
node_10.description: She hopes An Lushan will bring word of foreign goods because novelty draws a paying crowd.
node_10.embedding_key: She hopes An Lushan will bring word of foreign goods because novelty draws a paying crowd.

node_9.subject: self
node_9.description: She wants Chen Zian to visit tonight because educated customers attract more conversation and business.
node_9.embedding_key: She wants Chen Zian to visit tonight because educated customers attract more conversation and business.

node_8.subject: self
node_8.description: She expects scholars to recite poems if the tea house feels lively after sunset.
node_8.embedding_key: She expects scholars to recite poems if the tea house feels lively after sunset.

node_7.subject: self
node_7.description: She asked a lamp seller in West Market to reserve additional lanterns for tonight.
node_7.embedding_key: She asked a lamp seller in West Market to reserve additional lanterns for tonight.

node_6.subject: self
node_6.description: Last year's Lantern Festival crowd overflowed the doorway and left her short on hot water.
node_6.embedding_key: Last year's Lantern Festival crowd overflowed the doorway and left her short on hot water.

node_5.subject: self
node_5.description: She likes to send an extra cake to regular customers who have had a difficult day.
node_5.embedding_key: She likes to send an extra cake to regular customers who have had a difficult day.

node_4.subject: self
node_4.description: She has learned that examination candidates often bring the best gossip about officials and court moods.
node_4.embedding_key: She has learned that examination candidates often bring the best gossip about officials and court moods.

node_3.subject: self
node_3.description: She keeps careful accounts because one bad week in the market can ruin a season.
node_3.embedding_key: She keeps careful accounts because one bad week in the market can ruin a season.

node_2.subject: self
node_2.description: She knows which merchants bargain hard and which regulars quietly tip the servers.
node_2.embedding_key: She knows which merchants bargain hard and which regulars quietly tip the servers.

node_1.subject: self
node_1.description: She inherited the tea house from her mother after years of helping behind the counter.
node_1.embedding_key: She inherited the tea house from her mother after years of helping behind the counter.
